problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: If Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts is applied to ionic, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
